channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Insider Gaming Showcase—Everything Announced
item.content:encoded:
After months of work behind the scenes, the debut Insider Gaming Showcase premiered on Thursday, May 28. The show featured 55 games, including over a dozen world premieres.

You saw games like the reveals of Toypunk and Bassai-Dai, along with new trailers from Unyverse and Combo Devils. But we know not everyone is able to watch a full show or follow everything at once. That’s why we have put together the complete rundown of every game that was shown during the Insider Gaming Showcase.

Check out all of the games, wishlist the ones you like, and let us know what stood out to you down in the comments and over in the Insider Gaming Discord.

Every Game At The Insider Gaming Showcase

Hawthorn – Near Studios | Full Coverage

Former developers from Bethesda, BioWare, and Naughty Dog bring you a sandbox RPG realm of anthropomorphic animals and fairy creatures. Play co-op or solo as you build a village of memorable NPCs, farm, craft, explore, and celebrate the seasons in an ever-changing world bigger than you.

Where the Chips Fall – Coquito Games | Full Coverage

Balatro Meets Blackjack with a Cuphead aesthetic in this casino rogue-lite where you gamble with your abilities. Every chip you bet can turn the tide in your favor, but you could also lose it all in a bad hand. Think you can beat the house?

Hexrite – Phabula | Full Coverage

You are a sorcerer seeking to fulfil a magical ritual to summon an ancient dead deity. Cast mystical domes, explore fantastical realms and meet a peculiar cast of characters in this stylized PS2-inspired action-platformer!

Zoominoes – Starlight Games inc. | Full Coverage

Build the ultimate Zoo in this number-go-up roguelike deckbuilder. Find powerful mythical animals, boost them with snacks, and even manipulate the board itself. Break the game by scoring millions (and more) with insane combos.

ZeroSpace – Starlance Studios | Full Coverage

ZeroSpace is a sci-fi hybrid strategy game with a story-rich, party-based RPG campaign. As commander of the Protectorate forces, you must upgrade your mothership, build strong relationships with your crew and recruit a formidable army. Navigate the hard choices that will shape humanity’s future.

Toypunk – Eighth Lantern | Full Coverage

A comedic third-person shooter roguelite where you control customizable puppets armed with an infinite toybox of absurd weaponry. Fight hordes of cotton-stuffed baddies across fantastical biomes with your friends or on your own. Experience crazy synergies and unlock more toys between every run!

End of Ember – Bad Plan Studios | Full Coverage

Explore a gory Hell in this twin-stick shooter that pays homage to badass horror franchises. Kill demons, upgrade items, and fight weird and gross bosses until they explode in piles of gore. Who is Ember? What is reality?

Eclipse 2: Invasion of Darkness – MadRock | Full Coverage

Eclipse 2: Invasion of Darkness – is an isometric, story-driven game in the Action RPG genre, combining the mechanics of metroidvania exploration and the dynamics of modern slashers. Lead the medieval resistance against the alien invasion on Earth!

Ungaland – MevStudio | Full Coverage

“Dive into a prehistoric world of adventure where the power of primal seeds changes everything. Unlock abilities, attach them to your weapons, and face challenges in a vibrant land full of action, and surprises.”

Monster Mercs – Izak Games | Full Coverage

Transform into the monsters you slay and unleash new spells and abilities. Team up with up to 3 friends, take on unique contracts to get paid, upgrade your character and gear, and unlock powerful transformations in this fast-paced co-op action RPG.

The Stinky Adventures of DungDung – Rexroth Studios | Full Coverage

The Stinky Adventures of DungDung is a love-letter to many of the classic platformers we’ve played over the years. We draw inspiration from the likes of Jak & Daxter, Ratchet & Clank, and Sly Cooper. But we also asked ourselves, “What if we could mess with the world in small ways, inspired by greats such as Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom? (Or when we’d just enter console cheat codes.)

Project Eclipse – Unlikely Heroes Studio | Full Coverage

Meowstery Wisp – DMT Games | Full Coverage

A multiplayer social deduction and investigation game where players gather clues, debate, and manipulate trust to resolve a mystery; with no elimination until the big finale.

Lunar Strike – Cognition Europe | Full Coverage

Lunar Strike blends speculative fiction with a game world grounded in hard science. The game focuses on compelling survival and character-driven storytelling over combat. A race against time to preserve the evidence of humanity’s presence on the Moon before its inevitable collapse and destruction.

Unyverse – Afrime Studios | Full Coverage

Unyverse is an Afrofuturistic RPG With Fighting Game Mechanics Where Your Fists, Choices, and Inner Power Change the Fate of a Galaxy.

Good News – Augusto Salgado | Full Coverage

You’ve been hired as a chief editor to make this newspaper grow, but your writers are awful. Correct their drafts, set the tone of the news to fit your audience, make readership grow; and form a relationship with the shady politicians that will push you to give them good press in an electoral year

Carrier Cuties – Cornerstone Interactive Studios | Full Coverage

Carrier Cuties fast-paced 3D arena fighting game where Pets in Hu-Mechs battle in highly interactive and destructible environments using the surroundings to fight. Battle with a partner against two opponents to win all the glory and treats!

Terminal War – Albatross Interactive | Full Coverage

Terminal War is a grounded, team-based third-person shooter set in a fractured America during the late 1990s. Engage in intense combat across war-torn cities, forgotten towns, and contested territory where every bullet, every strike, and every decision counts.

Ward 107: Silence – Gaetano Tonzus | Full Coverage

WARD 107: SILENCE is a first person psychological horror. Your microphone is the key: use your voice to solve vocal puzzles and uncover the atrocious experiments of Project H.O.P.E. Speak to progress, but silence is your only defense when they hunt you. Make noise, and you die.

Alea – Afterlife Games | Full Coverage

Intense, fast-paced arena battles with a high skill ceiling. Alea is a skill-first hero brawler with quick, high-pressure matches and a broad array of characters. Master two sides of every hero and forge a playstyle that is uniquely your own to outplay your rivals in 1v1, 2v2 and 3v3 matches.

Take That Mainstage! – Fingers on the Moon | Full Coverage

It’s 1992 in Emerald City. The world screams for change. You made the leap, now fulfill your destiny and change the world. Build your band, write real music you perform, manage relationships, and reach the top of the charts. In this hybrid life sim, be the one to Take That Mainstage!

Brimvahl Crown – Chubby Puppy Pte.Ltd | Full Coverage

Brimvahl Crown is a narrative driven action RPG that follows the story of princess Kazmiel, a legendary seraph that was exiled from her kingdom. Now that the dark rises, Kazmiel must return to action. Dodge, Parry, and strike enemies down and save the world from the might of the Deathless King!

Mithra – Seventh Disorder | Full Coverage

Investigate the world’s first cult in a cryptic mystery adventure that blurs the lines between fiction and reality. We’ve been keeping an eye on you. Follow us further down the rabbit hole…

Cursed Blood – DM Studios | Full Coverage

Cursed Blood is a brutal 1-4 player co-op melee roguelike. Play as vengeful Samurai Apes fueled by rage, unleashing a whirlwind of lightning-fast combat. Spill blood, sever limbs, and claim your vengeance!

DekaDuck – Asteristic Game Studio | Full Coverage

DekaDuck is a 2D action platformer, featuring fully hand-drawn art and animation. Fight enemies using their own abilities and quirks to solve puzzles and defeat bosses, in a sci-fi world full of conspiracies!

Hounded – IMPRNT STUDIOS | Full Coverage

You are Duke, a determined young Border Collie who is searching for their lost master, the leader of The Rebellion. Hounded by a cunning hunter, can you track the scent, unearth the power of The Tide and find your way home?

Dicetris – Leik Games | Full Coverage

A puzzle game where numbers matter. Dicetris fuses classic block-stacking with a fresh numerical twist: build columns of coloured dice and match the exact sum at the base to clear them. Use sharp maths and smarter strategy to stay ahead as you plan, stack, and clear your way through each challenge.

My Pet Hooligan – AMGI Studios | Full Coverage

Liberate your city from Zuck Corp in this 1-4 player co-op TPS with roguelite elements. Choose your arsenal of Gadgets, Buffs and cartoon weapons. Blast bots and skateboard as you regain your turf. Get stronger each zone on your way to beat the evil overlord MetaZuckBot! Ready to join the Rebellion?

Cubex – Gamez Studio | Full Coverage

Cubex is a horror escape room game in first person, collaborative (or not) for up to 4 players, where your objective will be to find the exit of a giant cube.

Smash ‘N Grab – SLAP-BANG! Digital | Full Coverage

Smash ‘N Grab is a destructive, speedrunning beat ’em up starring Smash and Grab – a robot and raccoon duo pulling off explosive heists. Tethered by a rope, they race against the clock for the perfect score!

Hope in the City – Lofty Sky Entertainment | Full Coverage

17-year-old Hope Song returns home from school to find her parents missing. Use Hope’s observant eye as an artist to investigate, piece together clues, and uncover dark secrets beneath her peaceful urban life in this non-linear narrative mystery game.

AZUR – KADES Studio | Full Coverage

Azur is a fast-paced PvP survival FPS set on the French island of Belmas. Every time you respawn, complete missions, explore, and survive as long as possible to secure the best gear, with the risk of losing everything.

Rollergirl – Pushing Vertices | Full Coverage

Choose your own vibe in this slice-of-life adventure. While exploring a small town on rollerblades, use your MP3 player to set the mood for your summer. Run errands for quirky neighbours, get entangled in local drama and stumble into a teenage romance.

Brave New Wonders – City From Naught Inc. | Full Coverage

Command a tribe of intelligent automatons that can interpret ANY customized instruction you give in Brave New Wonders, a factory automation adventure. Pioneer a post-apocalyptic world, explore ruins from the past & discover a mysterious reality as you make your automated factories thrive!

Malice In Wonderland – Slyglass Games | Full Coverage

Tear through Wonderland and break free of The Hatter’s control in this fast-paced action roguelike. Augment your abilities to destroy your foes and escape before you’re out of time!

Paddler – Kosma Co. | Full Coverage

You’re the bartender at a lazy river pool bar. Type ingredients in rhythm to mix drinks and serve the rush. A typing game for enthusiasts who want their keystrokes to matter.

Project Mourning Reign – IronRoot Games | Full Coverage

Island of Winds – Parity Games | Full Coverage

Island of Winds is an adventure game set in a fantastical world inspired by 17th century Iceland and folklore. Experience the story of Brynhildur, a Balance Keeper who embarks on a journey of self-discovery. Core gameplay involves intriguing puzzles, spellcasting, and a focus on empathy encounters.

AGX GP – TYP1 Games | Full Coverage

AGX is a heart thumpingly fast, Anti-Gravity racing game. It’s lightning‑fast action and Xtreme ability‑based gameplay, will push your reactions and skills to the limit! Welcome To AGX!

GRIMPS – Watt Studio | Full Coverage

A dark, gritty action shooter featuring savage plushie aliens. Tear the Grimps to shreds, burn ’em down, or blast ’em with the Shrimpozooka—the Plushpocalypse is here!

Bassai-Dai – Kaloplay | Full Coverage

BASSAI-DAI is a stylized action-adventure game that blends fast-paced combat
with creative, ink brush-based gameplay.

Etre – Studio Lifeforms | Full Coverage

Enter an ancient alien mind spiraling toward collapse. Explore shifting inner worlds, unlock new abilities, and battle hostile anomalies in a 3D third-person action adventure. Stabilize the mind to forge a new world or let it awaken as something far more terrifying.

Crete – Mayhem Mirror Studios | Full Coverage

Fight against the Ancestors and other biopunk creatures. Use their DNA to build your own procedural weapons, find a friend and combine your skills to be even more powerful. The further you go, the better rewards you will get for the next run. It is up to you to reveal what is up there in the north.

Becoming Pablo – Tentworks Interactive | Full Coverage

Rule the underworld in this test of grand-strategy and city-building set in the 70’s-90’s drug trade. Conquer new territories, manage operations, and outsmart your rivals. Becoming Pablo isn’t just about building an empire – it’s about surviving it.

Project Madras – Royston Cinemo | Full Coverage

Project Madras – An open world Indie game setup in Chennai aka Madras. The city is the canvas and an exciting gaming experience is taking shape just for you makkale!

Combo Devils – Punkzilla | Full Coverage

Combo Devils is an evolution of the platform-fighting genre. Stylish combat, and a cooperative extraction roguelite mode offers content for all player skill levels. An experience that balances accessibility with a high execution ceiling for a dedicated core player base to grow around.

Rusthaven – Chaos Theory Games | Full Coverage

Rusthaven is a cosy management game about rebooting the world in the anti-apocalypse. Journey across an abandoned planet on a solar skyship, salvaging broken-down bots in need of rescue. Clean up the world, upcycle retro technology, and build a peaceful sanctuary where all can thrive and belong.

Valorborn – Laps Games | Full Coverage

Dive into a living medieval fantasy sandbox RPG where the world moves with or without you and factions rise and fall. Become a thief, hunter, or sellsword, survive alone or with a party, and shape your story in a fully enterable world where every building, cave, and road hides opportunity or danger.

Blind Descent – Pokuch | Full Coverage

Blind Descent is an open-world survival adventure that unveils the mysteries of the Martian depths. Play solo or with friends in 4-player co-op as you search for the missing team. Adapt to survive by building custom tools, upgrading the base, and/or mutating in this bizarre alien world.

Don’t Lose Aggro – Oren Koren | Full Coverage

Protect your team by forcing enemies to attack you in this single-player action roguelite inspired by MMO raids. Create unique builds, unlock powerful talents and master the art of tanking to command the chaos!

Waters of Ragnarök – Polar Region Games | Full Coverage

Waters of Ragnarök is a tactical naval survival game set after the Norse apocalypse. Navigate cursed seas, explore the lands, scavenge the massive corpses of Jötunns, and lead your crew through tactical battles against survivors and monsters in this Norse survival exploration game.

Everything is Gun! – Incineration Productions | Full Coverage

Developed by Incineration Productions for PC and consoles, Everything Is Gun! rejects modern cinematic hand-holding in favor of raw mechanical depth and unapologetic, high-stakes speed.

Deep Dive – Sky Lantern Studios | Full Coverage

Eggstinct – Manaforce Studios | Full Coverage

Eggstinct! is a cooperative, physics-driven dinosaur adventure where you and your friends must work together to rescue fragile eggs and survive chaotic prehistoric hazards.

Trickshotterz – Lumari Games | Full Coverage

BEER PONG GETS GUNS… Only shots in the top count, pick abilities, grab wild powerups, and pull off absurd trickshots that hit harder the crazier they are. Play with up to 4 players locally, online, or hop into public matchmaking.

Mike has been covering the gaming industry since 2012, and has reported on some of the largest events in the industry while also working as an investigative reporter. Outside of…

More from Mike Straw

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/insider-gaming-showcase-everything-announced/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Lunar Strike Gets New Gameplay Trailer at Insider Gaming Showcase
item.content:encoded:
Lunar Strike, a stunning single-player sci-fi title grounded in realism, has just received a new gameplay trailer during the Insider Gaming Showcase. Lunar Strike is an all-new exploration-driven, narrative-led title from Cognition, and it’s the team’s first game as a collective.

While Lunar Strike doesn’t have a release window, you’ll want to add this one to your wishlist if you’re a fan of all things sci-fi. This might be a fictional title, but it’s highly speculative and, in the words of the team, is ‘grounded in hard science.’

Needless to say, the sheer base concept of the game has me intrigued.

What is Lunar Strike?

Lunar Strike is an exploration-focused game set on Earth’s moon around 100 years in the future. Players assume control of an archivist sent to document the fall of humanity’s presence on the rocky landscape, but as you take off to handle that mission, catastrophe strikes.

Players are forced to contend with hazardous conditions, all rooted in real science, while choosing how and what to document as the world around them crumbles.

There’s a branching narrative to explore, and your choices shape the game before you.

Key Features

Logic, Not Violence

Lunar Strike focuses on telling a story while surviving against the atmosphere and not enemies. That said, you need to focus on using a range of archival scanning tools and fighting against the elements rather than some kind of alien lifeform. Depleting oxygen, suit energy, and habitat systems all come into question.

Forensic Reconstruction

Use your high-tech tools of the future to reconstruct scenes and solve mysteries of what happened to bring about the untimely end of the human race on the Moon.

Real Scientific Principles

Lunar Strike is grounded in real science, which means everything from orbital dynamics, survival systems, and the environment you explore is modeled on current lunar research and knowledge.

Lunar Strike Developer Interview

Check out our interview with Cognition:

The Studio Behind Lunar Strike

Cognition Europe is an independent studio based in Belgium and nurturing a passion for telling narrative-driven stories alongside a love for space science and speculative exploration. The studio was opened in 2022 and is an affiliate of Cognition US

The studio has ties to a years-old non-profit organization with a mission to promote ‘the digital conservation and protection of humanity’s collective culture and history.’

Links and More Information

  • Website: https://cognition.eu.com/
  • Store: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3949580/Lunar_Strike/

Does Lunar Strike look like your kind of game? Let us know on the Insider Gaming Discord server

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/lunar-strike-showcase/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Hawthorn’s Latest Trailer Revealed at Insider Gaming Showcase
item.content:encoded:
Hawthorn is a very special game. Former developers from Bethesda, BioWare, and Naughty Dog have teamed up to bring players a Sandbox RPG that supports co-op or solo experiences as they build their villages. The game also has personality-rich NPCs. The game is set in Windermere Valley, and while the inhabitants are all concerned about the reasons The Village was abandoned, the players have the opportunity to grow their own communities and create a fresh start for everyone. As this is a life simulator, players have the chance to engage with all of the creatures in whatever way they choose. You can be nice, or you can offend them, but each character comes with their own personality and backstory.

As seen during the Insider Gaming Showcase, the latest Gameplay trailer reveals even more of the expansive world to explore, as well as the unique sandbox events that can occur. The beauty of a game like this is that you have full autonomy to create your character the way you want, with a variety of species and backgrounds to choose from. Also, random events will occur throughout your experience that may not happen in someone else’s. Of course, you will have to farm, craft, and sustain your village, but if you so choose, you can do so with friends either online or through local co-op.

What Is Hawthorn?

To find out more about this upcoming open-world experience, Insider Gaming spoke with Heather Cerlan of NEARstudios. Her background includes credits on The Last of Us, Starfield, and Dragon Age. Check out the full interview below:

Key Features

Make an Impact Outside of Gaming

Early in May, it was announced that players will get the opportunity to reserve three exclusive characters that are all inspired by real-world endangered species. Each character will be designed to fit into the world of the game while maintaining their unique Aesthetics and backgrounds. Additionally, a portion of the proceeds from every reservation will be donated to conservation efforts and Charities that work to protect endangered species and their habitats.

Your Choices Matter

Whether it’s how you choose to solve conflicts, the way you face weather challenges that will occur, or how you interact with the creations around you, your choices matter in this game, and autonomy is key.

Villagers Help You Build

Harvest, fish, craft, and farm. That’s how you survive.  If you don’t want to always get your hands dirty, the NPC villagers can take on tasks you don’t want to do. Build and decorate the homes among the roots of great trees. If you cater to your villagers’ preferences, they will follow you to the end. 

Hawthorn Trailer

The Studio Behind Hawthorn

NEARstudios is a group of game developers from AAA studios like  Bethesda, BioWare, and Naughty Dog who are taking the indie path, developing their first passion project with the help of their players and community. Bethesda, in particular, is known for developing the Fable series, which this game resembles. There’s no release date planned yet, but they’re giving their all to the upcoming experience.

Links & More Information

  • Game’s Website: https://playhawthorn.com/
  • Dev Team’s Website: https://www.nearstudios.com/
  • Kickstarter: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/nearstudios/hawthorn
  • Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/PlayHawthorn
  • Discord: https://discord.com/invite/hawthorn 
  • Store: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3078150/Hawthorn/

To check out a comprehensive list on Steam of all the games featured at the Insider Gaming Showcase on May 28, click here.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/hawthorn-showcase/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Project Madras Playtest Announcement Revealed at Insider Gaming Showcase
item.content:encoded:
An open-world game in India isn’t something you see too often, and while the setting is quite unique, the premise is familiar: Infiltrate a gangster network, work as an agent for the government, complete jobs and side hustles, and build your name and brand in a big open world.

Project Madras is ‘a celebration of India’s culture, language, emotions and spirit.’

There’s a real, vibrant, open world here to explore, and it could be a very special one you can get involved with via a new playtest. Full details are below, revealed during the Insider Gaming Showcase.

What Is Project Madras?

Key Features

  • Dual Identity Gameplay:
    • Balance life between criminal networks and covert government objectives.
  • Dynamic Driving & Street Racing:
    • Ride bikes, trucks, and boats across the city, with street races and high-speed escapes.
  • Melee Combat with Stealth & Environmental Takedowns:
    • Close-quarters combat that blends stealth, hand-to-hand fighting, and using surroundings to gain advantage.
  • Side Missions & Street Activities:
    • Optional jobs and gigs that feed progression and world engagement.
  • Semi-Linear Open World Structure:
    • Free exploration with controlled Cinematic Missions within the open world.
  • Authentic World:
    • A dense urban space inspired by Chennai with local details and Crowd behavior.

Project Madras Trailer

The Studio Behind Project Madras

Project Madras is developed by a small independent studio based in India, focused on building grounded, narrative-rich experiences with a strong cultural identity, driven by a unique vision to optimize development through new technology and unconventional first-principles thinking.

Links & More Information

To check out a comprehensive list on Steam of all the games featured at the Insider Gaming Showcase on May 28, click here.

  • Website: https://www.projectmadras.com/
  • Discord: https://discord.com/invite/6qBNwDrnj5
  • Store: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2864600/Project_Madras/
  • Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/projectmadras/

Let us know what you think about Project Madras through the Insider Gaming Discord server, which is free to join!

Check the rest of our website, as we have news on over 50 titles shown off during the Insider Gaming Showcase!

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/project-madras-showcase/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Waters of Ragnarök Heads Out To Sea At The Insider Gaming Showcase
item.content:encoded:
Waters of Ragnarök is a post-Ragnarök tactical survival game from Polar Region Games, revealed as part of the Insider Gaming Showcase on May 28.

Set in a drowned Norse mythology-inspired world, the game places players in command of a ship built from the bones of dead gods. As you explore the fractured remnants of the Nine Realms, you must manage your crew, harvest resources from fallen Jötnar, and fight to guide your people toward Gimli in an effort to rebuild civilization from the ruins of Ragnarök.

The game blends survival systems, tactical combat, and exploration across a supernatural ocean world filled with monsters, storms, and ancient magic.

What Is Waters of Ragnarök?

To learn more about Waters of Ragnarök and its development, we sat down with the founder and CEO of developer Polar Region Games, Höskuldur Sigurðarson

Key Features

A Drowned Norse World

Explore the flooded remains of the Nine Realms. Players sail between fractured islands, uncover hidden regions, and navigate supernatural storms while discovering what remains of both land and sea.

Deep Origin System

Players choose from distinct origins tied to the Nine Realms. Each origin influences playstyle, crew management, and combat mechanics, adding replayability and strategic depth.

Tactical Combat

Combat focuses on positioning, engagement control, and environmental hazards. Battles are fast-paced and tactical, with success depending more on decision-making than raw stats.

Crew Survival and Morale

Crew members are not just resources. Players must manage hunger, injuries, and morale. Death is permanent, and low morale can cause the expedition to collapse before external threats do.

Jötunn Harvesting

Players can scale and harvest the remains of fallen giants to collect rare materials. These encounters function as both resource-gathering opportunities and large-scale environmental challenges.

Waters of Ragnarök Trailer

The Studio Behind Waters of Ragnarök

Polar Region Games is an independent studio based in Reykjavík, Iceland, focused on building games inspired by Norse mythology.

Founded by a small team of lifelong gamers, the studio operates as a lean development group with full ownership of their IP under the umbrella of their shared universe, Ashes of Yggdrasil. Waters of Ragnarök is their debut title within this world, with additional projects currently in concept development.

Links & More Information

  • Website: https://www.polarregiongames.com
  • Steam Page: https://store.steampowered.com/app/4422960/Waters_of_Ragnark/ 
  • Discord: https://discord.gg/DduvqCUc 
  • X (Twitter): https://x.com/PRegionGames 
  • Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/polarregiongames/ 
  • Linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/company/polar-region-games/ 
  • Facebook:  https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61573374190099 

Waters of Ragnarök Screenshots

Mike has been covering the gaming industry since 2012, and has reported on some of the largest events in the industry while also working as an investigative reporter. Outside of…

More from Mike Straw

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: New ZeroSpace Trailer Takes Off at Insider Gaming Showcase
item.content:encoded:
ZeroSpace is a cinematic sci-fi real-time strategy game built around three pillars, featuring a story-rich campaign with RPG-style choices, a persistent cooperative Galactic War, and a competitive Skirmish Mode.

The title combines classic RTS base-building and army control with campaign and part-member structure, inspired by narrative RPGs like Mass Effect and Baldur’s Gate.

ZeroSpace will be available to try in the Steam Next Fest in June, with early access planned to launch in Q3 2026 on Steam.

What is ZeroSpace?

To learn more about ZeroSpace and its development, take a look at our developer interview.

Key Features

Story-Rich Sci-Fi Campaign

A cinematic single-player campaign where player choices, crew relationships, and faction alliances affect the story. The campaign includes main story missions, hero loyalty missions, and side story arcs, with dialogue trees and choice-driven outcomes.

Persistent Galactic War Co-Op Mode

ZeroSpace includes a shared Galactic War mode where players contribute to a larger seasonal conflict across a persistent galaxy map. Mission variety includes co-op, PvE, single-player activities, 2vAI, 2v2, scenarios, and 1v1. The mode is similar to Helldivers 2, but with more factions and an RTS core gameplay mode.

Faction & Army Customization

Players build their strategy by combining main factions, mercenary factions, specialists, heroes, units, and buildings. ZeroSpace will have four main factions, seven mercenary factions, over 14 specialists, and more than 150 units and buildings.

Modernized RTS Controls & Quality-of-Life Features

ZeroSpace is designed to preserve the depth of classic RTS games, while reducing unnecessary friction. Many players have already expressed how it’s hard to go back to other RTS games without these QOL features.

Competitive VS Designed with RTS Veterans

1v1 and team-based versus modes designed with the help of RTS veterans, including prominent StarCraft personalities like CatZ, Scarlett, GiantGrantGames, Maguro, and PiG.

ZeroSpace Trailer

The Studio Behind ZeroSpace

Starlance Studios is a remote, independent studio building ZeroSpace out of a long-running love for classic real-time strategy games like Command and Conquer, StarCraft, and Age of Empires.

ZeroSpace began as a solo development effort by Marv Gouw, before growing into a team of roughly 15 people alongside additional part-time contributors.

Starlance Studios has recently been joined by Aaron Kambeitz, a co-founder of Relic Entertainment and lead artist on the sci-fi classic Homeworld. Under his art direction, ZeroSpace has found its visual soul.

Links & More Information

Official Website: https://www.playzerospace.com/

Let us know what you think about ZeroSpace through the Insider Gaming Discord server, which is free to join!

Check the rest of our website, as we have news on over 50 titles shown off during the Insider Gaming Showcase!

item.title: Hope in the City Debuts Fresh Trailer With Exciting Showcase Look
item.content:encoded:
Hope in the City is an apt title as our titular Hope Song needs all the prayers in the world as she searches the city in the hope (pun not intended) of finding her parents.

Hope in the City is described as a ‘Non-linear narrative mystery game from the team behind 2026 GDC Best in Play Winning sci-fi fantasy adventure-RPG Sky of Tides.’

The blocky, atmospheric art style complements the sense of despair, and Lofty Sky Games has lofty ambitions for its narrative thriller, which you can learn more about, thanks to the Insider Gaming Showcase.

What Is Hope in the City?

Key Features

  • Solve the Mystery Through Artful Investigation
    • Gather clues, record observations, and piece together the truth using sketches in Hope’s notebook. Dive deep into the investigation to uncover what lies beneath the city’s calm facade.
  • A Unique Gameplay Mechanic, Based on Thoughts
    • Progress by building your observations into insights. Then, make breakthroughs to get closer to solving the mysterious disappearance of your parents.
  • An Art Style with Edge for a Unique Experience
    • Experience a bold art style that blends story and visuals, creating a unique world that invites closer exploration. Experience custom cutscenes throughout the game as you progress in solving the mystery!

Hope in the City Trailer

The Studio Behind Hope in the City

Lofty Sky Games team members have worked on games such as Battlefield, Minecraft Legends, and I Was A Teenage Exocolonist, and worked at studios including EA, Ubisoft, and Behaviour Interactive. 

The animation team is equally impressive, having created numerous award-winning projects, including the first-ever animated feature selected as Canada’s official submission to the Oscars for Best International Film.

Links & More Information

To check out a comprehensive list on Steam of all the games featured at the Insider Gaming Showcase on May 28, click here.

  • Website: https://loftysky.com/
  • Discord: https://discord.com/invite/8rfuqMJxq5
  • Store: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3610790/Hope_in_the_City/
  • X: https://x.com/LoftySkyGames
  • LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jasonloftus1/

Let us know what you think about Hope in the City through the Insider Gaming Discord server, which is free to join!

Check the rest of our website, as we have news on over 50 titles shown off during the Insider Gaming Showcase!

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton

item.title: CRETE Gets New Gameplay Trailer at Insider Gaming Showcase
item.content:encoded:
CRETE just received a stunning new gameplay trailer during the Insider Gaming Showcase, unveiling more of this innovative, intriguing roguelike title. Mayhem Mirror Studios is piecing together CRETE, and it’s set to be the firm’s debut title. Everything from the visual palette to the weapons you use is novel in CRETE, and the new trailer reveals more of what’s coming.

CRETE doesn’t have a release window locked in just yet, but it’s firmly a recommendation for a prestigious spot on your Steam wishlist. Check out everything you need to know about CRETE below.

What is CRETE?

CRETE is an intense action-roguelike title that catapults players into a brutal world populated with hulking, terrifying enemies. It’s a battle between good and evil; between god-like entities called the Ancestors and a race of bioengineered warriors that evolve massively over time.

As you explore CRETE, you’ll constantly adapt and mutate, collecting critical DNA samples to alter your body and create fresh ways to fight. In the words of Mayhem Mirror Studios, there are millions of combinations to discover.

Players can either go it alone or fight together, but the team has stressed that CRETE blossoms best when enjoyed cooperatively. It’s an inherently tricky game, but it’s not impossible, and players will find the combat mechanics to be fast-paced, fresh, and energetic.

Key Features

Multi-Faceted Combat Mechanics

CRETE encourages a range of playstyles and approaches, such is the roguelike nature of the game. With that in mind, you can go hand-to-hand, use intense melee weapons, or pick your enemies off from a distance, utilizing the mutation mechanic to keep things mixed as you explore the game.

True Cooperative Gameplay

Mayhem Mirror Studios has advised that CRETE can be completed as a solo player, but for the best experience possible, it’s advised to go at it with a friend. As it states on Steam: ‘The world is waiting to demonstrate the real meaning of teamwork.’

Bioengineering Approach

CRETE uses a unique bioengineering concept to empower the player, ensuring they can evolve in ways they never thought possible. As CRETE unfolds, players will lean on millions of potential mutation combinations, growing as a character and a combatant in this harsh world.

CRETE Developer Interview

Check out our interview with Mayhem Mirror Studios here:

The Studio Behind CRETE

CRETE is being developed by Mayhem Mirror Studios, a two-person team consisting of a game director and developer, and an art director and 3D modeller. Until now, Mayhem Mirror has focused on creating animated media, such as short films, but CRETE will be the team’s first foray into video games.

CRETE has a demo coming this summer, so keep your eyes peeled and your wishlists loaded.

Links and More Information

  • Website: https://www.cretegame.com/
  • Twitter: https://x.com/cretegame
  • Store: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2022610/CRETE/

Let us know on the Insider Gaming Discord server if CRETE seems like your kind of game

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

item.title: New Etre Trailer & Details Revealed at Insider Gaming Showcase
item.content:encoded:
Etre is a 3D third-person action adventure, set in an ancient alien mind spiralling toward collapse, where players explore shifting inner worlds, unlock new abilities, and battle hostile anomalies.

The Metroidvania title is set inside Orbis, a planet-scale alien mind, where players explore a vast, interconnected labyrinth of luminous architecture to solve spatial puzzles and engage in fluid ground and aerial combat.

Inspired by the visionary sci-fi of 70s-80s European graphic novels, the journey has multiple endings, with choices and discoveries shaping whether Orbis stabilizes, becomes a god-mind, or awakens and something far more terrifying.

What is Etre?

To learn more about Etre and its development, take a look at our developer interview.

Key Features

Discover a Beautiful World

Explore a vast, interconnected 3D labyrinth, with abilities that open new paths through familiar spaces.

Fluid Ground & Aerial Combat

Switch between ground and aerial combat, destroying, subduing, or repurposing strange machines and anomalies as tools and allies. Confront boss encounters that play like duels and riddles, demanding both reflexes and understanding.

Save The One You Love

Follow in the footsteps of Atel, your bonded one, and navigate the competing visions of two Etre leaders with incompatible plans for Orbis and Lucent, the structured light that forms this world. Piece together a non-linear story about love, awakening, and responsibility.

Etre Trailer

The Studio Behind Etre

Studio Lifeforms is a game design studio based in Los Angeles, making virtual worlds and experiences using real-time technologies.

It is a two-person independent game studio, with co-founders Damjan Jovanovic and Lidija Kljakovic working alongside each other.

Links & More Information

Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2391940/ETRE/

Website: https://lifeforms.io/

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/lifeforms.io/

Let us know what you think about Etre through the Insider Gaming Discord server, which is free to join!

Check the rest of our website, as we have news on over 50 titles shown off during the Insider Gaming Showcase!
